test-case.sql: SELECT * FROM t_merchant WHERE business_code LIKE '%1'
test-case.scenario-comments: Test encrypt table's LIKE operator percentage wildcard for left match number in simple select statement when use encrypt feature.

test-case.sql: SELECT * FROM t_merchant WHERE business_code LIKE '86%'
test-case.scenario-comments: Test encrypt table's LIKE operator percentage wildcard for right match number in simple select statement when use encrypt feature.

test-case.sql: SELECT * FROM t_merchant WHERE business_code LIKE '86%1%'
test-case.scenario-comments: Test encrypt table's LIKE operator percentage wildcard for mixed match number in simple select statement when use encrypt feature.

test-case.sql: SELECT * FROM t_merchant WHERE business_code LIKE '__000001'
test-case.scenario-comments: Test encrypt table's LIKE operator underscore wildcard for left match number in simple select statement when use encrypt feature.

test-case.sql: SELECT * FROM t_merchant WHERE business_code LIKE '8600000_'
test-case.scenario-comments: Test encrypt table's LIKE operator underscore wildcard for right match number in simple select statement when use encrypt feature.

test-case.sql: SELECT * FROM t_merchant WHERE business_code LIKE '_1_0001_'
test-case.scenario-comments: Test encrypt table's LIKE operator underscore wildcard for mixed match number in simple select statement when use encrypt feature.

test-case.sql: SELECT * FROM t_merchant WHERE business_code LIKE '_1%'
test-case.scenario-comments: Test encrypt table's LIKE operator percentage and underscore wildcard for mixed match number in simple select statement when use encrypt feature.

test-case.sql: SELECT * FROM t_user WHERE user_name LIKE '%san'
test-case.scenario-comments: Test encrypt table's LIKE operator percentage wildcard for left match letter in simple select statement when use encrypt feature.

test-case.sql: SELECT * FROM t_user WHERE user_name LIKE 'j%'
test-case.scenario-comments: Test encrypt table's LIKE operator percentage wildcard for right match letter in simple select statement when use encrypt feature.

test-case.sql: SELECT * FROM t_user WHERE user_name LIKE 'j%r%'
test-case.scenario-comments: Test encrypt table's LIKE operator percentage wildcard for mixed match letter in simple select statement when use encrypt feature.

test-case.sql: SELECT * FROM t_user WHERE user_name LIKE '_ack'
test-case.scenario-comments: Test encrypt table's LIKE operator underscore wildcard for left match letter in simple select statement when use encrypt feature.

test-case.sql: SELECT * FROM t_user WHERE user_name LIKE 'jorda_'
test-case.scenario-comments: Test encrypt table's LIKE operator underscore wildcard for right match letter in simple select statement when use encrypt feature.

test-case.sql: SELECT * FROM t_user WHERE user_name LIKE 'li__'
test-case.scenario-comments: Test encrypt table's LIKE operator underscore wildcard for mixed match letter in simple select statement when use encrypt feature.

test-case.sql: SELECT * FROM t_user WHERE user_name LIKE '%li_'
test-case.scenario-comments: Test encrypt table's LIKE operator percentage and underscore wildcard for mixed match letter in simple select statement when use encrypt feature.

test-case.sql: SELECT * FROM t_user WHERE user_name LIKE '%靖'
test-case.scenario-comments: Test encrypt table's LIKE operator percentage wildcard for left match chinese character in simple select statement when use encrypt feature.

test-case.sql: SELECT * FROM t_user WHERE user_name LIKE '王%'
test-case.scenario-comments: Test encrypt table's LIKE operator percentage wildcard for right match chinese character in simple select statement when use encrypt feature.

test-case.sql: SELECT * FROM t_user WHERE user_name LIKE '王%民%'
test-case.scenario-comments: Test encrypt table's LIKE operator percentage wildcard for mixed match chinese character in simple select statement when use encrypt feature.

test-case.sql: SELECT * FROM t_user WHERE user_name LIKE '_莽'
test-case.scenario-comments: Test encrypt table's LIKE operator underscore wildcard for left match chinese character in simple select statement when use encrypt feature.

test-case.sql: SELECT * FROM t_user WHERE user_name LIKE '王善_'
test-case.scenario-comments: Test encrypt table's LIKE operator underscore wildcard for right match chinese character in simple select statement when use encrypt feature.

test-case.sql: SELECT * FROM t_user WHERE user_name LIKE '王__'
test-case.scenario-comments: Test encrypt table's LIKE operator underscore wildcard for mixed match chinese character in simple select statement when use encrypt feature.

test-case.sql: SELECT * FROM t_user WHERE user_name LIKE '%安_'
test-case.scenario-comments: Test encrypt table's LIKE operator percentage and underscore wildcard for mixed match chinese character in simple select statement when use encrypt feature.

test-case.sql: SELECT * FROM t_merchant WHERE merchant_id IN (SELECT merchant_id FROM t_merchant WHERE business_code LIKE '%1')
test-case.scenario-comments: Test encrypt table's LIKE operator percentage wildcard for left match number in subquery select statement when use encrypt feature.

test-case.sql: SELECT * FROM t_merchant WHERE merchant_id IN (SELECT merchant_id FROM t_merchant WHERE business_code LIKE '86%')
test-case.scenario-comments: Test encrypt table's LIKE operator percentage wildcard for right match number in subquery select statement when use encrypt feature.

test-case.sql: SELECT * FROM t_merchant WHERE merchant_id IN (SELECT merchant_id FROM t_merchant WHERE business_code LIKE '86%1%')
test-case.scenario-comments: Test encrypt table's LIKE operator percentage wildcard for mixed match number in subquery select statement when use encrypt feature.

test-case.sql: SELECT * FROM t_merchant WHERE merchant_id IN (SELECT merchant_id FROM t_merchant WHERE business_code LIKE '__000001')
test-case.scenario-comments: Test encrypt table's LIKE operator underscore wildcard for left match number in subquery select statement when use encrypt feature.

test-case.sql: SELECT * FROM t_merchant WHERE merchant_id IN (SELECT merchant_id FROM t_merchant WHERE business_code LIKE '8600000_')
test-case.scenario-comments: Test encrypt table's LIKE operator underscore wildcard for right match number in subquery select statement when use encrypt feature.

test-case.sql: SELECT * FROM t_merchant WHERE merchant_id IN (SELECT merchant_id FROM t_merchant WHERE business_code LIKE '_1_0001_')
test-case.scenario-comments: Test encrypt table's LIKE operator underscore wildcard for mixed match number in subquery select statement when use encrypt feature.

test-case.sql: SELECT * FROM t_merchant WHERE merchant_id IN (SELECT merchant_id FROM t_merchant WHERE business_code LIKE '_1%')
test-case.scenario-comments: Test encrypt table's LIKE operator percentage and underscore wildcard for mixed match number in subquery select statement when use encrypt feature.

test-case.sql: SELECT * FROM t_user WHERE user_id IN (SELECT user_id FROM t_user WHERE user_name LIKE '%san')
test-case.scenario-comments: Test encrypt table's LIKE operator percentage wildcard for left match letter in subquery select statement when use encrypt feature.

test-case.sql: SELECT * FROM t_user WHERE user_id IN (SELECT user_id FROM t_user WHERE user_name LIKE 'j%')
test-case.scenario-comments: Test encrypt table's LIKE operator percentage wildcard for right match letter in subquery select statement when use encrypt feature.

test-case.sql: SELECT * FROM t_user WHERE user_id IN (SELECT user_id FROM t_user WHERE user_name LIKE 'j%r%')
test-case.scenario-comments: Test encrypt table's LIKE operator percentage wildcard for mixed match letter in subquery select statement when use encrypt feature.

test-case.scenario-comments: Test encrypt table's LIKE operator underscore wildcard for left match letter in subquery select statement when use encrypt feature.

test-case.sql: SELECT * FROM t_user WHERE user_id IN (SELECT user_id FROM t_user WHERE user_name LIKE 'li__')
test-case.scenario-comments: Test encrypt table's LIKE operator underscore wildcard for mixed match letter in subquery select statement when use encrypt feature.

test-case.sql: SELECT * FROM t_user WHERE user_id IN (SELECT user_id FROM t_user WHERE user_name LIKE '%li_')
test-case.scenario-comments: Test encrypt table's LIKE operator percentage and underscore wildcard for mixed match letter in subquery select statement when use encrypt feature.

test-case.sql: SELECT * FROM t_user WHERE user_id IN (SELECT user_id FROM t_user WHERE user_name LIKE '%靖')
test-case.scenario-comments: Test encrypt table's LIKE operator percentage wildcard for left match chinese character in subquery select statement when use encrypt feature.

test-case.scenario-comments: Test encrypt table's LIKE operator percentage wildcard for mixed match chinese character in subquery select statement when use encrypt feature.

test-case.sql: SELECT * FROM t_user WHERE user_id IN (SELECT user_id FROM t_user WHERE user_name LIKE '_莽')
test-case.scenario-comments: Test encrypt table's LIKE operator underscore wildcard for left match chinese character in subquery select statement when use encrypt feature.

test-case.sql: SELECT * FROM t_user WHERE user_id IN (SELECT user_id FROM t_user WHERE user_name LIKE '王善_')
test-case.scenario-comments: Test encrypt table's LIKE operator underscore wildcard for right match chinese character in subquery select statement when use encrypt feature.

test-case.sql: SELECT * FROM t_user WHERE user_id IN (SELECT user_id FROM t_user WHERE user_name LIKE '王__')
test-case.scenario-comments: Test encrypt table's LIKE operator underscore wildcard for mixed match chinese character in subquery select statement when use encrypt feature.

test-case.sql: SELECT * FROM t_user WHERE user_id IN (SELECT user_id FROM t_user WHERE user_name LIKE '%安_')
test-case.scenario-comments: Test encrypt table's LIKE operator percentage and underscore wildcard for mixed match chinese character in subquery select statement when use encrypt feature.

test-case.sql: SELECT * FROM t_merchant m1 INNER JOIN t_merchant m2 ON m1.merchant_id = m2.merchant_id WHERE m2.business_code LIKE '%1'
test-case.scenario-comments: Test encrypt table's LIKE operator percentage wildcard for left match number in select join statement when use encrypt feature.

test-case.sql: SELECT * FROM t_merchant m1 INNER JOIN t_merchant m2 ON m1.merchant_id = m2.merchant_id WHERE m2.business_code LIKE '86%'
test-case.scenario-comments: Test encrypt table's LIKE operator percentage wildcard for right match number in select join statement when use encrypt feature.

test-case.sql: SELECT * FROM t_merchant m1 INNER JOIN t_merchant m2 ON m1.merchant_id = m2.merchant_id WHERE m2.business_code LIKE '86%1%'
test-case.scenario-comments: Test encrypt table's LIKE operator percentage wildcard for mixed match number in select join statement when use encrypt feature.

test-case.sql: SELECT * FROM t_merchant m1 INNER JOIN t_merchant m2 ON m1.merchant_id = m2.merchant_id WHERE m2.business_code LIKE '__000001'
test-case.scenario-comments: Test encrypt table's LIKE operator underscore wildcard for left match number in select join statement when use encrypt feature.

test-case.sql: SELECT * FROM t_merchant m1 INNER JOIN t_merchant m2 ON m1.merchant_id = m2.merchant_id WHERE m2.business_code LIKE '8600000_'
test-case.scenario-comments: Test encrypt table's LIKE operator underscore wildcard for right match number in select join statement when use encrypt feature.

test-case.sql: SELECT * FROM t_merchant m1 INNER JOIN t_merchant m2 ON m1.merchant_id = m2.merchant_id WHERE m2.business_code LIKE '_1_0001_'
test-case.scenario-comments: Test encrypt table's LIKE operator underscore wildcard for mixed match number in select join statement when use encrypt feature.

test-case.sql: SELECT * FROM t_merchant m1 INNER JOIN t_merchant m2 ON m1.merchant_id = m2.merchant_id WHERE m2.business_code LIKE '_1%'
test-case.scenario-comments: Test encrypt table's LIKE operator percentage and underscore wildcard for mixed match number in select join statement when use encrypt feature.

test-case.sql: SELECT * FROM t_user u1 INNER JOIN t_user u2 ON u1.user_id = u2.user_id WHERE u2.user_name LIKE '%san'
test-case.scenario-comments: Test encrypt table's LIKE operator percentage wildcard for left match letter in select join statement when use encrypt feature.

test-case.sql: SELECT * FROM t_user u1 INNER JOIN t_user u2 ON u1.user_id = u2.user_id WHERE u2.user_name LIKE 'j%'
test-case.scenario-comments: Test encrypt table's LIKE operator percentage wildcard for right match letter in select join statement when use encrypt feature.

test-case.scenario-comments: Test encrypt table's LIKE operator underscore wildcard for left match letter in select join statement when use encrypt feature.

test-case.scenario-comments: Test encrypt table's LIKE operator underscore wildcard for right match letter in select join statement when use encrypt feature.

test-case.scenario-comments: Test encrypt table's LIKE operator underscore wildcard for mixed match letter in select join statement when use encrypt feature.

test-case.scenario-comments: Test encrypt table's LIKE operator percentage and underscore wildcard for mixed match letter in select join statement when use encrypt feature.

test-case.scenario-comments: Test encrypt table's LIKE operator percentage wildcard for left match chinese character in select join statement when use encrypt feature.

test-case.sql: SELECT * FROM t_user u1 INNER JOIN t_user u2 ON u1.user_id = u2.user_id WHERE u2.user_name LIKE '王%'
test-case.scenario-comments: Test encrypt table's LIKE operator percentage wildcard for right match chinese character in select join statement when use encrypt feature.

test-case.sql: SELECT * FROM t_user u1 INNER JOIN t_user u2 ON u1.user_id = u2.user_id WHERE u2.user_name LIKE '王%民%'
test-case.scenario-comments: Test encrypt table's LIKE operator percentage wildcard for mixed match chinese character in select join statement when use encrypt feature.

test-case.sql: SELECT * FROM t_user u1 INNER JOIN t_user u2 ON u1.user_id = u2.user_id WHERE u2.user_name LIKE '_莽'
test-case.scenario-comments: Test encrypt table's LIKE operator underscore wildcard for left match chinese character in select join statement when use encrypt feature.

test-case.scenario-comments: Test encrypt table's LIKE operator underscore wildcard for mixed match chinese character in select join statement when use encrypt feature.

test-case.sql: SELECT * FROM t_user u1 INNER JOIN t_user u2 ON u1.user_id = u2.user_id WHERE u2.user_name LIKE '%安_'
test-case.scenario-comments: Test encrypt table's LIKE operator percentage and underscore wildcard for mixed match chinese character in select join statement when use encrypt feature.

test-case.sql: SELECT country_id, COUNT(1) FROM t_merchant WHERE business_code LIKE '%1' GROUP BY country_id ORDER BY country_id
test-case.scenario-comments: Test encrypt table's LIKE operator percentage wildcard for left match number in select group by statement when use encrypt feature.

test-case.sql: SELECT country_id, COUNT(1) FROM t_merchant WHERE business_code LIKE '86%' GROUP BY country_id
test-case.scenario-comments: Test encrypt table's LIKE operator percentage wildcard for right match number in select group by statement when use encrypt feature.

test-case.sql: SELECT country_id, COUNT(1) FROM t_merchant WHERE business_code LIKE '86%1%' GROUP BY country_id
test-case.scenario-comments: Test encrypt table's LIKE operator percentage wildcard for mixed match number in select group by statement when use encrypt feature.

test-case.sql: SELECT country_id, COUNT(1) FROM t_merchant WHERE business_code LIKE '__000001' GROUP BY country_id
test-case.scenario-comments: Test encrypt table's LIKE operator underscore wildcard for left match number in select group by statement when use encrypt feature.

test-case.sql: SELECT country_id, COUNT(1) FROM t_merchant WHERE business_code LIKE '8600000_' GROUP BY country_id
test-case.scenario-comments: Test encrypt table's LIKE operator underscore wildcard for right match number in select group by statement when use encrypt feature.

test-case.sql: SELECT country_id, COUNT(1) FROM t_merchant WHERE business_code LIKE '_1_0001_' GROUP BY country_id
test-case.scenario-comments: Test encrypt table's LIKE operator underscore wildcard for mixed match number in select group by statement when use encrypt feature.

test-case.sql: SELECT country_id, COUNT(1) FROM t_merchant WHERE business_code LIKE '_1%' GROUP BY country_id
test-case.scenario-comments: Test encrypt table's LIKE operator percentage and underscore wildcard for mixed match number in select group by statement when use encrypt feature.

test-case.sql: SELECT user_id, COUNT(1) FROM t_user WHERE user_name LIKE 'j%' GROUP BY user_id
test-case.scenario-comments: Test encrypt table's LIKE operator percentage wildcard for right match letter in select group by statement when use encrypt feature.

test-case.sql: SELECT user_id, COUNT(1) FROM t_user WHERE user_name LIKE '_ack' GROUP BY user_id
test-case.scenario-comments: Test encrypt table's LIKE operator underscore wildcard for left match letter in select group by statement when use encrypt feature.

test-case.sql: SELECT user_id, COUNT(1) FROM t_user WHERE user_name LIKE 'jorda_' GROUP BY user_id
test-case.scenario-comments: Test encrypt table's LIKE operator underscore wildcard for right match letter in select group by statement when use encrypt feature.

test-case.sql: SELECT user_id, COUNT(1) FROM t_user WHERE user_name LIKE 'li__' GROUP BY user_id
test-case.scenario-comments: Test encrypt table's LIKE operator underscore wildcard for mixed match letter in select group by statement when use encrypt feature.

test-case.sql: SELECT user_id, COUNT(1) FROM t_user WHERE user_name LIKE '%li_' GROUP BY user_id
test-case.scenario-comments: Test encrypt table's LIKE operator percentage and underscore wildcard for mixed match letter in select group by statement when use encrypt feature.

test-case.sql: SELECT user_id, COUNT(1) FROM t_user WHERE user_name LIKE '%靖' GROUP BY user_id
test-case.scenario-comments: Test encrypt table's LIKE operator percentage wildcard for left match chinese character in select group by statement when use encrypt feature.

test-case.sql: SELECT user_id, COUNT(1) FROM t_user WHERE user_name LIKE '王%' GROUP BY user_id
test-case.scenario-comments: Test encrypt table's LIKE operator percentage wildcard for right match chinese character in select group by statement when use encrypt feature.

test-case.sql: SELECT user_id, COUNT(1) FROM t_user WHERE user_name LIKE '王%民%' GROUP BY user_id
test-case.scenario-comments: Test encrypt table's LIKE operator percentage wildcard for mixed match chinese character in select group by statement when use encrypt feature.

test-case.scenario-comments: Test encrypt table's LIKE operator underscore wildcard for left match chinese character in select group by statement when use encrypt feature.

test-case.scenario-comments: Test encrypt table's LIKE operator underscore wildcard for right match chinese character in select group by statement when use encrypt feature.

test-case.sql: SELECT user_id, COUNT(1) FROM t_user WHERE user_name LIKE '%安_' GROUP BY user_id
test-case.scenario-comments: Test encrypt table's LIKE operator percentage and underscore wildcard for mixed match chinese character in select group by statement when use encrypt feature.
